message:
Running command: # librelane with --from ignores the resolved.json and re-resolves from config.json + PDK
# BUT the PDK hash 8afc8346 keeps appearing. Something is pointing librelane to the old hash.
# Even though /nc/pdk only has 0fe599b2, librelane is still resolving to 8afc8346.
# Check if there's a PDK version pin file
find /nc/pdk -name "*.json" -o -name "version" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "---"
cat /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/sky130A.yml 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "no yml"
ls /nc/pdk/ 2>/dev/null
